name: token_inspector
description: Comprehensive token intelligence. Retrieves name, symbol, price, market cap, volume, and security metadata for any token. **IMPORTANT: Provide the Contract Address (0x...) for the most accurate results.** Supports Base, Ethereum, Solana, and 10+ EVM chains.

token.description: Contract address (0x... or Solana address) preferred. Tickers are also supported but less accurate.
